@@ -435,6 +437,12 @@ def _synthesise_contradictions(
             key=lambda s: _SEVERITY_ORDER.get(s, 99),
         )
 
+        # Preserve code_replacement from the highest-confidence source finding that has one
+        source = max(
+            (f for f in group if f.code_replacement),
+            key=lambda f: f.confidence,
+            default=None,
comment_body_excerpt: **🟡 [MEDIUM] code_replacement is preserved from the highest-confidence source finding, but if multiple findings have the same confidence, the choice is arbitrary (max() returns the first match), leading to non-deterministic suggestion blocks. Additionally, max() is called twice on the same group — o
